storyInfo: Hekádemos meets up with Xanthos and Lykeion after they escape from prison. A crowd has gathers in anticipation of the relic exchange ceremony.

attributes.content: Oripathy suppressants for two. A few days have passed since their last injection. Give them a shot as soon as you see them to prevent an acute attack.
attributes.name: Lena

attributes.content: The rest are standard medicine. This is a painkiller, these improve cardiovascular functions, this is for blood pressure, and this is for regulating blood oxygen levels.
attributes.name: Lena

attributes.content: Xanthos seems to be hiding his illness and may be unwilling to take medicine. Bring it anyway, and make him carry it any way you can.
attributes.name: Lena

attributes.content: The Oripathy suppressant is mandatory. The rest depends on him.
attributes.name: Lena

attributes.content: Alright. Is this all for Xanthos? What about Lykeion?
attributes.name: Hekádemos

attributes.content: Lykeion? Suppressant injections are the only thing that can be done at his current stage.
attributes.name: Lena

attributes.content: It's that bad?
attributes.name: Hekádemos
Lena
attributes.content: It's not so bad. No need to worry.

attributes.name: Lena
attributes.content: There's water and cheese pita for three in this bag.
I'm not going on a picnic...
attributes.name: Hekádemos

attributes.content: Bring it anyway. You might get hungry.
attributes.name: Lena

attributes.content: Don't worry, I also got you some good stuff.
attributes.name: Lena

attributes.content: This box contains soporific incense pills. Just in case.
attributes.name: Lena

attributes.content: Make sure you stand upwind when you use it, or you'll put yourself to sleep.
attributes.name: Lena

attributes.content: Kyría Athopoulou... I thought we had already made the arrangements?
attributes.name: Hekádemos

attributes.content: Kassandra has obtained the schedule of the jailer shifts.
attributes.name: Hekádemos

attributes.content: The Astynomos' Office has a duplicate key for the jail door and shackles, and I made my own duplicate—
attributes.name: Hekádemos

attributes.content: It was careless of Lydia to leave them on the table.
attributes.name: Hekádemos

attributes.content: There hasn't been a prison breakout in ages, so security isn't particularly strict. I'll find the right time, go in, get them out. Shouldn't run into any issues.
attributes.name: Hekádemos

attributes.content: There's no need to be overly nervous.
attributes.name: Hekádemos

attributes.content: I know... it's what happens afterwards that I'm thinking about.
attributes.name: Lena

attributes.content: You're worried you can't distract Lydia? Or are you worried about your future?
attributes.name: Hekádemos

attributes.content: While I'm the one who's actually carrying out the prison break, Lydia is likely to find out about your participation.
attributes.name: Hekádemos

attributes.content: It may obstruct your company's efforts to develop your Athenian office...
attributes.name: Hekádemos

attributes.content: Xanthos and Lykeion are my patients, even though one of them isn't the most cooperative.
attributes.name: Lena

attributes.content: When I made the decision to become a doctor, I also made the decision that I will not leave any patient behind.
attributes.name: Lena

attributes.content: There are some things that have to be done, no matter the price.
attributes.name: Lena

attributes.content: It's Lydia whom I'm really worried about... I need to talk to her.
attributes.name: Lena

attributes.content: Don't worry about me. But you...
attributes.name: Lena

attributes.content: Don't worry about me.
attributes.name: Hekádemos

attributes.content: There's nothing left for me here. The only reason I didn't quit was that I was waiting for Lydia to fire me so that I could collect my severance—
attributes.name: Hekádemos

attributes.content: Not getting it is my only regret.
attributes.name: Hekádemos

attributes.content: I'm more excited than anxious about leaving this nomadic city for broader horizons.
attributes.name: Hekádemos

attributes.content: I heard you were once forced to leave Athenius, Kyría Athopoulou. Perhaps you understand the feeling.
attributes.name: Hekádemos

attributes.content: ...Yes, I do.
attributes.name: Lena

attributes.content: Your situation now is much like mine back then.
attributes.name: Lena
Lena
attributes.content: You—

attributes.name: Lena
attributes.content: Things will get better for you, I promise.
Just as it got better for me.
attributes.name: Lena

attributes.content: We need to find a way to get out of here.
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: We can't just sit here and wait.
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: Yes, we need to get Lena to look at you. Your health—
attributes.name: Lykeion

attributes.content: My health is not important.
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: The relic exchange ceremony takes place this afternoon.
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: If the Sargonians are allowed to take the engineering notes from the Three Poleis, they will be able to dictate how the history is told.
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: This must be stopped.
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: Hold it, Xanthos.
attributes.name: Ithakos's Father

attributes.content: You have Oripathy. Many on the Sargonian border contracted the disease in the conflict, just like you.
attributes.name: Ithakos's Father

attributes.content: ...Yes.
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: Many lost their homes, their livelihoods. But you found your footing after coming to Athenius.
attributes.name: Ithakos's Father

attributes.content: You've got a new life. Why do you want to get involved in such things?
attributes.name: Ithakos's Father

attributes.content: Maybe it's because I have Oripathy.
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: I don't have much time left. I must spend what little I have on things that are more meaningful.
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: Then you're just another Minoan bound by the heroic dream.
attributes.name: Ithakos's Father

attributes.content: I don't think about those things. Oripathy saps the heroic spirit. I have not had the heroic dream ever since I left my homeland.
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: Is that so?
attributes.name: Ithakos's Father

attributes.content: Who could have imagined...?
attributes.name: Ithakos's Father

attributes.content: Ithakos found a good friend out on the borderlands.
attributes.name: Ithakos's Father

attributes.content: The guards change shifts in fifteen minutes. That's your opportunity to get out.
attributes.name: Ithakos's Father

attributes.content: Go out the door and turn left, then take the second right turn, and go right every time you see a crossroads after that. You shouldn't see any guards if you get out within five minutes.
attributes.name: Ithakos's Father

attributes.content: You'll eventually find yourselves in the kitchen, which should be empty at this hour. You can get out from there.
attributes.name: Ithakos's Father

attributes.content: Oh, right, the shackles. Come over, I'll unlock them.
attributes.name: Ithakos's Father

attributes.content: Why...?
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: Why don't I leave? Well, my situation is a little different—not everyone in this prison is scheduled for the death sentence. Some need to be locked up until the day they die, like me.
attributes.name: Ithakos's Father

attributes.content: And why should I leave, when I don't have to worry about room and board? What difference is there anywhere on Terra?
attributes.name: Ithakos's Father

attributes.content: Or did you want to ask why I made these preparations? Came in useful right now, didn't it?
attributes.name: Ithakos's Father

attributes.content: There.
attributes.name: Ithakos's Father

attributes.content: ...Thank you.
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: You're welcome.
attributes.name: Ithakos's Father

attributes.content: I don't know what you're planning when you get out, but I doubt there'll be a place for you in this city anymore. I don't suppose we'll meet again.
attributes.name: Ithakos's Father

attributes.content: Ithakos died for his heroic dream. Divine revelation had shown his future. None of us could stop it.
attributes.name: Ithakos's Father

attributes.content: But you're not the same. You haven't received your divine revelation yet. Perhaps... in the distant future...
attributes.name: Ithakos's Father

attributes.content: Until then... live well.
attributes.name: Ithakos's Father

attributes.content: All this stone, these incomplete statues, and those scaffolds—why are they still here?
attributes.name: Behnui

attributes.content: I knew your people are lazy, but I didn't expect you to be so shockingly inefficient.
attributes.name: Behnui

attributes.content: And where is that Astynomos of yours?! She's the one who should be receiving me here!
attributes.name: Behnui

attributes.content: We've already discussed the ceremony with Titi.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: A space has been cleared for the ceremony, the speakers and spotlights have been set up, and signs have been placed around the audience seats.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: We've completed all the necessary preparations. The things that you noted are not.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: Medjehtiqedti? She's nowhere to be seen.
attributes.name: Behnui

attributes.content: I'm in charge of the Sargonian mission now, and it's MY needs you must attend to.
attributes.name: Behnui

attributes.content: And I think that your preparations are entirely inadequate for a ceremony as important as the exchange of relics between Sargon and Minos.
attributes.name: Behnui

attributes.content: As you said, it is an important ceremony, and we will do everything in our power in the remaining time to make the venue as perfect as possible.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: However, I must also put a question to you—
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: What is the condition of the relic that you are handing over, which is of paramount importance to Minoans and the First Temple—the harp of Kereseira?
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: I heard that it suffered a serious fall a few days ago at the dock, and that your delegation intends to repair it. Are the repairs complete?
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: And I'm curious—while I don't know how your padishah and Lydia came to such an agreement, does the agreement include an appraisal as well?
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: You're overstepping, Pallas.
attributes.name: Behnui

attributes.content: We have an accord with the Astynomos. This will be a massive occasion. She informs me that priests from Lachedamon and Corinia will be in attendance as well.
attributes.name: Behnui

attributes.content: This is unprecedented publicity for you and your temple. You should focus your full efforts on the preparations.
attributes.name: Behnui

attributes.content: You do not need to worry about anything else.
attributes.name: Behnui

attributes.content: You're right. I look forward to the event in the afternoon.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: That Sargonian sure has his nose in the air, doesn't he? I'm surprised you didn't punch him.
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: Or are your plans in motion, and you're just watching the clown make a fool of himself?
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: Clown? Are you talking about yourself?
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: You've been in Athenius a little too long, Corinian.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: The apples that the Athenian orchards are exporting to Corinia have already been packaged into boxes. Why are you still here?
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: I'm a priest of Corinia. It's my job to attend certain important occasions, in addition to business dealings. I'm here at your Astynomos' invitation.
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: Besides, to a Corinian, a transaction that has already been settled belongs in the past. The important thing is to seek opportunity for the future.
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: Is that why you keep sniffing around like a musbeast in a ditch? What favors did Lydia promise you?
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: Is there anything you won't sell for the right price? Your dignity, your conscience, even your soul?
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: Everything is for sale. If you can afford it.
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: Rather than pay so much attention to me, I suggest you spend it on the people who are not here.
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: You mean the Astynomos? It's true that she and her Grammateús should be here, but neither are.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: Perhaps they've been sidetracked by private matters.
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: It's someone else whom I'm talking about. As the Sargonian said, the Astynomos has invited priests from the other poleis.
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: The guest from Corinia is standing in front of you. But where is the priestess from Lachedamon?
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: Think about it. A Lachedamonian, stubborn, obstinate, serious barbarian, for whom violence is the only answer to any problem.
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: As far as I know, this particular Lachedamonian was born in Athenius, but she was taken to Lachedamon from a young age, for reasons unknown, and grew up in a temple there.
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: She wears certain elements of Athenius, perhaps as a kind of memento, but she was brought up with an orthodox Lachedamonian temple education.
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: The three-time reigning champion of the Lachedamon Pankration, and the youngest priest in the city's history, having graduated top of her class.
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: I'm curious... how would such a remarkable figure react, if she saw an unexpected scene of chaos?
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: This is the real reason why I stayed.
attributes.name: Períandros

attributes.content: Good timing. Take over for me for a moment. We need someone here who can be in charge.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: I'd better find Titi. I coaxed a little bit of information out of the Sargonian deputy. Apparently, her plan to steal the harp was unsuccessful. I'm worried for her.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: If she failed, I'll spill the beans at the ceremony... we have to discuss how to proceed after that.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: The problem is that I don't know where she is. She wasn't at the hotel...
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: She's at the burdenbeast ranch on the outskirts.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: Ranch? Why?
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: Go and find her. Maybe you'll witness a miracle, and find that all those things you were worrying about are not a problem anymore.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: Don't forget what I said to you last night.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: I think someone's coming, master.
attributes.name: Lykeion

attributes.content: Did we take a wrong turn?
attributes.name: Lykeion

attributes.content: I don't think so.
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: Just one person, I think.
attributes.name: Lykeion

attributes.content: We've come too far to give up now.
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: Go hide in that corner. When they pass, knock them out and throw them into an empty cell.
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: Okay.
attributes.name: Lykeion

attributes.content: Cover their mouth and don't let them make a sound.
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: Hm... how should I talk to him when I see him?
attributes.name: Hekádemos
Hekádemos
attributes.content: Hm...

attributes.name: Hekádemos
attributes.content: Whoa?!
Mmph—mm—ouch—who are you—ugh—huh?
attributes.name: Hekádemos

attributes.content: What are you doing here?
attributes.name: Lykeion

attributes.content: Phew, finally got out. Let's hide here for now.
attributes.name: Hekádemos

attributes.content: Thank you.
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: Don't mention it! Just glad to get you safely out of there.
attributes.name: Hekádemos

attributes.content: The next part is the hard part... I have to take you to the ancient route. Kassandra has your documents and luggage waiting there.
attributes.name: Hekádemos

attributes.content: We'll need to be careful and avoid drawing attention to ourselves. Let's hope it takes a while for the jailers to notice...
attributes.name: Hekádemos

attributes.content: Kassandra...
attributes.name: Xanthos

attributes.content: She was very worried about you. Did you want to say goodbye to her before leaving? I can understand.
attributes.name: Hekádemos
Hekádemos
attributes.content: But she's at the First Temple right now, where all eyes are on. It will be difficult.

attributes.name: Hekádemos
attributes.content: Let me think...
Movement over there.
attributes.name: Lykeion

attributes.content: The jailers found out so quickly?!
attributes.name: Hekádemos

attributes.content: I don't think so... sounds like the crying of a beast.
attributes.name: Lykeion

attributes.content: Burdenbeast!
attributes.name: Lykeion

attributes.content: What are burdenbeasts doing in the city?!
attributes.name: Hekádemos

attributes.content: Moo—!
attributes.name: Massive Burdenbeast

attributes.content: The burdenbeasts are coming straight at us!
attributes.name: Hekádemos

attributes.content: Master!
attributes.name: Lykeion

attributes.content: Titi said the harp that the Sargonians brought was fake.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: You're not surprised?
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: I'll talk to her about it later. It's you whom I'm looking for.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: You've been relying on her to handle the First Temple's matters for you these past few days.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: I thought we already talked about this. Who's in charge is not important.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: But she can't replace a priest.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: Only the priests have full knowledge of the heroes that a temple venerates, the ceremony to invite them, and the ceremonial plays.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: Only a priest can gather the spirit of the heroes during a performance.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: You're the only one who can do it for Kereseira's First Temple. No one can do it in your stead, not even me.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: Stop running, Pallas.
attributes.name: Kassandra

attributes.content: I know. I wasn't going to run from my responsibility, the day I made the decision to return to Minos.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: She does worry, doesn't she? I should buy her a round of drinks after everything's done.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: What did she discuss with Titi last night, anyway? I forgot to ask...
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: And what's this 'miracle' that she was talking about?
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: I finally understand the meaning of the idiom, 'suffering is the price of wisdom.'
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: I didn't feel that way when I was a priest, but now I fully understand how irritating their habit of speaking in riddles is.
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: What exactly is Titi doing at the burdenbeast ranch, anyway?
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: Pallas! Look out!
attributes.name: Melitta

attributes.content: It began as a distant growl, as Pallas rides at a steady pace on the street.
Then she sees the distant movement close in rapidly, becoming a herd of rampaging burdenbeasts.
Dozens of burdenbeasts charge through the streets with unstoppable momentum, leaving peace officers and herders in the dust, sending pedestrians and stalls flying.
They wear the scarf of the burdenbeast ranch on the outskirts—
Where Kassandra said Titi was at?
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: Something seems to have frightened these normally docile creatures, as they form a tidal wave that rushes in the opposite direction from the ranch.
The burdenbeast at the rear of the stampede... there's something on its horn—
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: Is that... a harp?! Could it be... Kereseira's...?
attributes.name: Pallas

attributes.content: Is this the 'miracle' that Kassandra was talking about?
attributes.name: Pallas
